news.title: ABD Başkan Yardımcısı Vance: 'İran nükleer denetçilerin ülkeye girişine izin verdi'

news.title: Oyuncu Ufuk Bayraktar'ın yargılandığı dava düştü. "Yanlış anlaşılma oldu"

news.title: TFF başkanlık seçimi ne zaman?

news.title: Vance says Iran will allow nuclear inspectors back into the country
news.summary: The US vice-president says a great deal of progress has been made after the first round of talks between the US and Iran.

news.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
news.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.

news.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
news.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.

news.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
news.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.

news.title: Clive Davis, music mogul behind Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies aged 94
news.summary: The record company executive also worked with Billy Joel, Pink Floyd, Alicia Keys and Aerosmith.

news.title: Red heat alerts issued in France, Italy and Spain as 40C temperatures forecast
news.summary: The heatwave conditions are forecast to intensify in the coming days across central and western Europe.

news.title: Canada’s inflation hits 29-month high amid heightened oil prices
news.summary: Petrol prices lead the surge with a 33.2 percent price increase on an annual basis.

news.title: Lebanon Latest: Israeli attacks surge despite ceasefire efforts
news.summary: Israeli attacks intensify across southern Lebanon despite ongoing diplomatic efforts.

news.title: US partially lifts Iran oil sanctions amid ‘encouraging’ talks
news.summary: The move, expected under the MoU, comes as Vice President JD Vance says there's a 'good foundation' for a final deal.

news.title: Why Washington’s reflecting pool has gone from ‘US blue’ to algae green
news.summary: Donald Trump, who spent $14m relining the iconic pool, claims it has been vandalised by 'radical left lunatics'.

news.title: Football, war and solidarity: Why Gaza fans turned to Spain this World Cup
news.summary: Football fans in Gaza showed overwhelming support for Spain against Saudi Arabia during Sunday's World Cup clash.

news.title: Former US Federal Reserve Chairman Alan Greenspan dies at age 100
news.summary: Greenspan presided over economic turbulence, including crises and booms, during his 18-year tenure as Fed chairman.

news.title: 2 students in custody after shooting at high school in Philippines kills 3
news.summary: An investigation is underway to determine the cause. Police said the suspects claimed they were bullied at school.

news.title: Supreme Court allows a ruling that ends a tool to protect minority voters in 7 states
news.summary: The Supreme Court has left in place a ruling that strikes down a key tool for enforcing Voting Rights Act protections for voters with a disability or an inability to read or write in seven states.

news.title: 8 things to know about the gut microbiome and keeping yours healthy
news.summary: Wellness influencers often talk about fixing a broken gut microbiome. And marketers sell tests and supplements to fix your gut health. Here's what what the evidence really shows about gut health.

news.title: Alan Greenspan, the legendary former Federal Reserve chair, dies
news.summary: During his chairmanship, Greenspan was celebrated as possibly the best central banker in history. But later, his reputation was tarnished by the worst financial crisis since the Great Depression.

news.title: UK PM Keir Starmer resigns. And, US and Iran agree to roadmap for final deal
news.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced his resignation on Monday. And, the U.S. and Iran have agreed to a "roadmap" to reach a final deal within 60 days.

news.title: Keir Starmer has resigned, paving way for a 7th U.K. prime minister in 10 years
news.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer is stepping down. His likely successor, Andy Burnham, a popular former mayor, would become the U.K.'s seventh prime minister in 10 years.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
